channel.title: Open VSwitch on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Open VSwitch on DevOpsTales

item.title: Kubernetes Egress Gateway with Kube-OVN
item.description: Kube-OVN is an open source Kubernetes CNI based on Open vSwitch that provides enterprise-grade networking features including Egress Gateway and Floating IP - completely free and open source. This post explores Kube-OVN’s egress capabilities as another robust open source alternative.

item.title: Kubernetes Egress Gateway with Antrea
item.description: Antrea is an open source Kubernetes CNI based on Open vSwitch that provides advanced networking features including Egress Gateway - completely free and open source. This post explores Antrea’s egress capabilities as a true open source alternative.
